title: What is Tokenization in NLP?

title: The Shift from Using AI to Running Enterprise Workflows with It
summary: AI is becoming part of enterprise workflows. See how businesses are using AI to drive decisions and execution across functions. The post The Shift from Using AI to Running Enterprise Workflows with It appeared first on Fusemachines .
author: Fusemachines

title: This NotebookLM feature cuts my workload by 50%
summary: Most of what you upload to #NotebookLM won't make it into your final output. The trick is figuring out what matters without reading everything. That's where Mind Maps come in. Instead of scanning through every source, you generate one map and instantly see every topic and subtopic laid out visually, allowing you to cherry-pick what's relevant and skip the rest. Since my audience cares a LOT more about practical tips as opposed to technical stuff, I clicked "11 Practical Techniques" on the mind map and skipped "Agentic Toggles API Tips" entirely. This opens a focused chat where I could find the specific subtopics that my viewers would actually appreciate! 😁 Try this next time you're prepping a project with multiple sources. #AI #productivity
author: Jeff Su

title: Why 90% Medical AI Models Fail Regulatory Review
summary: The rapid adoption of AI in medicine has introduced not only new technical possibilities but also heightened scrutiny from regulatory bodies responsible for clinical safety and effectiveness.
